description: Phase E shadow-implementation run for the pg-claude calibration loop. Take a pgsql-hackers thread (COVER + thread discussion only — NOT the attached patch), produce a spec, run the planner suite (pg-feature-brainstorm / pg-feature-plan / pg-implement) as-if the user asked for the feature, fetch the upstream patch only after implementation is complete, diff against ours, score the gap, and emit comparison.md + skill-gaps.md. Output is calibration data about the planner suite's implementation accuracy. Use when the user invokes `/pg-shadow <thread-url>`, says "shadow-implement that thread", or "run Phase E against <thread>". Do NOT trigger for actual upstream patches we plan to send (use `pg-feature-plan` + `pg-implement` directly), for already-committed threads (re-implementing landed code is meaningless), or for non-PG calibration.

results.query: run Phase E against the Filip Janus temp-file compression thread
review this patch I want to submit upstream
shadow-implement that thread about temp-file compression
help me debug why VACUUM is slow on my production database
